zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Northwode II於1279年出生在英國諾福爾可阿申維爾索普時，他的父親Sir John Northwood I25歲，母親Joan Badlesmere14歲。他和Mary Say至少有1個女兒。他去世於1318年9月8日在英國肯特享年39歲。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Northwode II was born in 1279, in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir John Northwood I, was 25 and his mother, Joan Badlesmere, was 14. He had at least 1 daughter with Mary Say. He died on 8 September 1318, in Kent, England, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Northwode II est né en 1279, à Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Northwood I, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Joan Badlesmere, avait 14 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Mary Say. Il est décédé le 8 septembre 1318, à Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Northwode II 1279 in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Northwood I 25 und seine Mutter Joan Badlesmere 14. Er hatte mit Mary Say mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 8. September 1318 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Northwode II è nato il nel 1279 nel Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir John Northwood I, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Joan Badlesmere, aveva 14 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Mary Say. Morì il 8 settembre 1318, nel Kent, England, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Northwode IIが1279年にイギリスノーフォルクアシュウエルソルペで生まれた時，父Sir John Northwood Iは25歳，母Joan Badlesmereは14歳であった。彼はMary Sayとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1318年9月8日にイギリスケントで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Northwode II(이)가 1279년 영국 노르폴크 애스h웰소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Northwood I(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Badlesmere(은)는 14세였다. 그는 Mary Say(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1318년 9월 8일 영국 켄트에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Northwode II nasceu em 1279, em Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Northwood I, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Joan Badlesmere, tinha 14 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Mary Say. Ele faleceu em 8 de setembro de 1318, em Kent, Inglaterra, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Northwode II родился в 1279 г. в местности ашвеллтаурп, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Northwood I было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Badlesmere, 14. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Mary Say. Он умер 8 сентября 1318 г. в местности кэнт, Англия в возрасте 39 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Mary Say. Murió el 8 de septiembre de 1318, en Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años.
